description:
Replace internal/template/ (custom HTML-comment DSL) with Go text/template.

Create internal/tmpl/tmpl.go:
- Execute(w, name, src, data, bwFn) — thin wrapper around text/template
- bw template function captures command output via PlainWriter (always markdown), preventing ANSI corruption

Migrate prompts:
- prime.md: {prefix} → {{ .Prefix }}, <!-- bw ready --> → {{ bw "ready" }}
- start.md: <!-- IF type == epic --> → {{ if eq .Type "epic" }}, {id} → {{ .ID }}, <!-- bw show {id} --only children --> → {{ bw "show" .ID "--only" "children" }}
- agents.md: No template syntax (copy-pasted into AGENTS.md). Just remove design comment block.

Template data structs:
- PrimeData{Prefix}
- StartData{ID, Type, Status, Parent, WorkflowReview}

Migrate cmd/bw/prime.go and cmd/bw/start.go to use tmpl.Execute + emit().

Delete internal/template/template.go and internal/template/template_test.go.

Files: internal/tmpl/tmpl.go, internal/tmpl/tmpl_test.go, prompts/prime.md, prompts/start.md, prompts/agents.md, cmd/bw/prime.go, cmd/bw/start.go + their tests
title: Replace template DSL with Go text/template
